name: Maintenance Underpass
description: Runoff drips from broken concrete seams while the service lights stutter like a bored witness.
detail: The underpass is all lockboxes, dead conduits, and graffiti warning you away from hatches that look recently used.

fixtures.name: service hatch
fixtures.inspect: The hatch has been opened enough times to polish the bolts and frighten everyone with sense.

fixtures.name: graffiti
fixtures.inspect: The graffiti is layered with route marks, memorial tags, and one warning repeated in three hands: DON'T OPEN ON RED LIGHT.

mood: The runoff is louder than usual, which means something upstream is not where it should be.
Tonight the service light is stuck on red and somebody has crossed it out with chalk anyway.
Three of the cable trays have been opened and reseated; the seal stickers do not match.

scavenge.note: You probe the underpass seams and cable trays for whatever the city forgot to retrieve.
scavenge.message: Behind a loose conduit plate you find a wrapped lockspike set and a reason not to mention it upstairs.
